About: It is about the symptom of pain in the face, head, or neck.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Cyclic Vomiting Syndrome.
CausedBy: It is caused by dehydration.
It is caused by fatigue.
It is caused by sleep deprivation.
It is caused by stress.
It is caused by the effects of medications overuse.
It is caused by the effects of recreational drugs.
It is caused by viral infections.
It is caused by loud noises.
It is caused by head injury.
It is caused by rapid ingestion of a very cold food or beverage.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by pulsing head pain.
It is characterized by nausea.
It is characterized by photophobia.
It is characterized by phonophobia.
It is characterized by non-pulsing bandlike pressure on both sides of the head.
It is characterized by short episodes of severe pain.
It is characterized by autonomic symptoms.
It is characterized by shooting face pain.
It is characterized by continuous unilateral pain with episodes of severe pain.
It is characterized by recurrent episodes of stabbing ice pick pain or jabs and jolts.
IsA: It is a symptom of pain in the face, head, or neck.
It is a migraine.
It is a tension-type headache.
It is a cluster headache.
It is one of the most commonly experienced of all physical discomforts.
It is a primary headache.
It is a secondary headache.
It is a cervicogenic headache.
It is a painkiller headache.
It is a post-ictal headache.
OccurredIn: It occurred in a given year.
